entry.title: UBCO NGFW Security Update, August 12, 2026. 20:00-21:00 PT
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Aug 12, 20:00 - 21:00 PDT

Jun 16, 14:55 PDT
Scheduled - The UBCO campus border firewall will be under maintenance for security upgrades.

This maintenance will not impact UBCO network traffic and services.

entry.title: Emergency Power System Load-Shedding Verification Test – Pharmacy Building and University Data Center
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jul 8, 06:30 - 08:30 PDT

Jun 17, 14:46 PDT
Scheduled - On Wednesday, July 8, 2026, between 6:30 a.m. and 8:30 a.m., a scheduled test of the Pharmacy Building's emergency power system will be conducted. The purpose of this test is to verify the automatic load-shedding functionality of the standby electrical systems when one of the building's two emergency generators is taken out of service.

During the test, brief interruptions may occur to systems served by the Standby power distribution. Emergency and Data Center power systems are expected to remain operational throughout the test, with the Data Center UPS maintaining uninterrupted service. Qualified Operations, Electrical, Controls, BMS, and IT Facilities personnel will be on-site to monitor system performance and respond to any issues.

entry.title: Scheduled Maintenance for Graduation Management Application (CNVM- Appian) from 29 Jun 2026 10:00 PT - 29 Jun 2026 16:00 PT
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jun 29, 10:00 - 16:00 PDT

Jun 18, 15:05 PDT
Scheduled - The Enterprise Automation and Solution Delivery (EASD) Graduation Management Application will undergo maintenance from 29 Jun 2026 from 10:00 to 29 Jun 2026 16:00. During this period, there may be a brief service interruption between 12:00 PM and 12:30 PM PT. Staff and students using the application are advised to plan accordingly.

entry.title: University Computer Management System (UCMS) Maintenance June 27, 2026, 00:00-11:00 PT
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jun 27, 00:00 - 11:00 PDT

Jun 18, 14:12 PDT
Scheduled - University Computer Management System (UCMS) Maintenance for Apple devices (Jamf Pro) will be undergoing routine maintenance on June 27, 2026, 00:00-11:00 PT. During this time Apple devices will not be able to contact the server for updates, however no disruption to the use of Apple devices is expected.

entry.title: Workday Scheduled Weekly Maintenance June 26, 2026, 21:00 PT to June 27, 2026, 00:00 PT
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jun 26, 21:00 PDT  -  Jun 27, 00:00 PDT

Jun 22, 09:18 PDT
Scheduled - Please be advised that on June 26, 2026, 21:00 PT to June 27, 2026, 00:00 PT, Workday will be undergoing scheduled maintenance as part of its weekly service update. The system will remain accessible during the scheduled maintenance period but it is advised not to run critical processes and tasks.

Learn about Workday Support at UBC and other available resources on isc.ubc.ca.

entry.title: WeBWorK Infrastructure Migration Jun 26, 2026 14:00-14:59 PT
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jun 26, 14:00 - 14:59 PDT

Jun 16, 14:58 PDT
Scheduled - WeBWorK (webwork.elearning.ubc.ca) will be unavailable on Jun 26, 2026 between 14:00 and 14:59 PT while the service is migrated to new infrastructure. Users with an active session may need to log in again. We apologize for any inconvenience; questions can be directed to the LT Hub (lt.hub@ubc.ca).

entry.title: TouchNet TEST site - Scheduled Maintenance June 26, 2026 - 05:00 a.m. to June 26, 2026 - 05:00 p.m.
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jun 26, 05:00 - 17:00 PDT

May 26, 12:12 PDT
Scheduled - The TouchNet TEST site will be undergoing scheduled maintenance. During the update window the TouchNet TEST site will be offline for logging in by staff as a TouchNet user and for making TEST payments.
For any questions please contact dpp.support@ubc.ca

entry.title: EASD Planned Maintenance for Minor EASD RDS Upgrade on June 25th, 2026, 17:00 - 20:00 PT
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jun 25, 17:00 - 20:00 PDT

Jun 16, 14:50 PDT
Scheduled - Multiple enterprise services will undergo maintenance on June 25th, 2026, from 17:00 to 20:00 PT.

Maintenance will be performed after hours to minimize potential impacts.

Release Notes

The following maintenance activities will be completed:

Upgrade EASD AWS Aurora PostgreSQL Database iecrds-prd-11 from v15.10 to v15.17
Apply AWS OS patches
Release Impact

There may be interruptions to the applications below for up to 5 minutes while the database patches are performed.

Services may be impacted during the upgrade.

EASD RDS may experience an interruption of up to 5 minutes during the upgrade. The read-only instance will remain available, so the impact should be limited to applications or integrations connecting to the read-write instance.
DAF data is expected to remain online throughout the maintenance window.
Mule APIs, including services available through api.ubc.ca, may experience intermittent outages if they connect to the read-write instance or if their connection strings have not been updated to use the standby configuration.
Scheduled Rundeck jobs may be delayed during the maintenance window and will be re-run after the outage, where applicable.
All services are expected to recover automatically after the maintenance is completed.

entry.title: UBCIT eSAM Servers Maintenance June 24, 2026, 20:00-22:00 PT
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jun 24, 20:00 - 22:00 PDT

Jun 4, 11:48 PDT
Scheduled - UBCIT will be performing maintenance on the eSAM component and vault servers on June 24, 2026, 20:00-22:00 PT. This change will affect both UBC campuses.

Users will intermittently not be able to login to any servers managed by eSAM, nor retrieve any credentials via the eSAM Web UI throughout the maintanance window.

Any connections terminated while a component is being rebooted can be reconnected to the secondary node. All connections will be terminated and users won't be able to reconnect while we patch the vault servers (which typically lasts around 30 minutes) during this window.

entry.title: UCMS Remote Support (Beyondtrust) Maintenance June 22, 2026 08:00 PT
entry.content:
Jun 22, 20:00 PDT
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

Jun 22, 15:51 PDT
Update - We are continuing work to restore the Remote Support service following a recent system migration. Additional configuration is in progress, and our technical teams are actively working to resolve the issue.

The maintenance window has been extended and the service remains unavailable at this time. A new completion time is not yet confirmed.

We will provide updates as more information becomes available. Thank you for your patience.

Jun 22, 12:43 PDT
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Jun 22, 12:43 PDT
Scheduled - Maintenance will be performed on the UCMS Remote Support service (Beyondtrust) on Monday June 22, 2026 between 08:00 PT. Remote Support Technicians will not be able to access the BeyondTrust Remote Support Rep Console during the temporary outage and thus will not be able to provide Remote Support to their clients during this time.

entry.title: UBC Wireless Network Maintenance on Saturday, June, 20, 2026 09:00 to 17:00 PT
entry.content:
Jun 20, 17:00 PDT
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

Jun 20, 09:00 PDT
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Jun 16, 14:57 PDT
Scheduled - The wireless team will be performing network maintenance from Saturday, June, 20, 2026 09:00 to 17:00 PT. During this time, there will be a brief outage to all WiFi services at the following sites:

- UBC Vancouver
- UBC Okanagan
- Robson Square
- Smaller remote sites where UBC IT managed wireless networks are available.

Breif outages to eduroam at the following areas of operation;

- BCCHRI
- UBC affiliated teaching hospitals

entry.title: RESOLVED - UBC CMS Hosted Websites Unreachable for Off-Campus Access Jun 19, 2026 10:00 AM PT
entry.content:
Jun 19, 13:50 PDT
Resolved - This incident has been resolved.

Jun 19, 10:25 PDT
Monitoring - We received reports of UBC CMS-hosted websites being unreachable for off-campus users starting at approximately 9:30 a.m. today. This issue has since been resolved as of 10:00 a.m Pacific. We will continue to monitor the situation and investigate the root cause.

Please email LT.Hub@ubc.ca if you are still experiencing issues or have any questions or concerns.

entry.title: TouchNet PROD (Marketplace) site - Scheduled Maintenance June 18, 2026, 12:00 PT - June 18, 2026, 12:30 PT
entry.content:
Jun 18, 12:30 PDT
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

Jun 18, 12:00 PDT
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Jun 18, 11:13 PDT
Scheduled - The TouchNet PROD (Marketplace) site will be undergoing scheduled maintenance. During the update window the TouchNet PROD site will be offline for logging in by staff as a TouchNet user and for customers making new payments. During this time when the payor clicks "pay now" TouchNet will display a screen informing the payor that the system is off line for maintenance and to try again after the system is back online.
This is to address the Marketplace "item is not available" error issue. Please note TouchNet has advised this will be completed today due to the impact of this issue and are prioritizing this update to restore full purchasing functionality ahead of the weekend.

For any questions please contact dpp.support@ubc.ca

entry.title: Ponderosa Housing Hub Complex Network Switch Replacement June 17, 2026 22:00 - June 18, 2026 05:00 PT
entry.content:
Jun 18, 05:00 PDT
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

Jun 17, 22:00 PDT
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Jun 15, 12:24 PDT
Scheduled - Network maintenance is being performed at the Ponderosa Housing Hub Complex, involving replacement of aging network infrastructure. During this service window from June 17, 2026 22:00 - June 18, 2026 05:00 PT; network services will be interrupted briefly and intermittently while physical and logical changes are being performed on the network backbones and while the user ports are migrated to new switching infrastructure.

entry.title: UBC IT myDNS Maintenance June 17, 2026 17:30-22:30 PT
entry.content:
Jun 17, 22:30 PDT
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

Jun 17, 17:30 PDT
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Jun 16, 14:59 PDT
Scheduled - UBC IT will be performimg maintenance on the myDNS Management Server. DNS/DHCP service will not be impacted but access to the myDNS management interface at https://mydns.ubc.ca may be intermittent while maintenance is being performed.

Jun 12, 21:00 PDT

Jun 8, 14:34 PDT
Scheduled - Please be advised that on June 12, 2026, 21:00 PT to June 13, 2026, 04:00 PT, Workday will be undergoing scheduled maintenance as part of its monthly service update. The system will remain accessible during the scheduled maintenance period but it is advised not to run critical processes and tasks
Learn about Workday Support at UBC and other available resources on isc.ubc.ca.

entry.title: Network system maintenance upgrade June 12, 2026 17:00-22:00 PT
entry.content:
Jun 12, 22:00 PDT
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

Jun 12, 17:00 PDT
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Jun 12, 14:12 PDT
Scheduled - UBC IT will be performing a scheduled network firewall upgrade on:
Date: June 12, 2026
Time: 17:00 – 22:00 PT
During this maintenance window, you may experience a brief network interruption (less than 1 minute).

entry.title: Eduroam intermittent connection issues - June 11, 2026 - 13:00 PT
entry.content:
Jun 12, 08:27 PDT
Resolved - The issue has been resolved

Jun 11, 14:27 PDT
Investigating - UBC affiliated users are having intermittent issues authenticating to Eduroam at multiple Teaching Hospitals in the Lower Mainland. Technicians are aware and investigating.

Jun 12, 00:00 PDT
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

May 26, 12:10 PDT
Scheduled - The TouchNet PROD site will be undergoing scheduled maintenance. During the update window the TouchNet PROD site will be offline for logging in by staff as a TouchNet user and for customers making new payments. During this time when the payor clicks "pay now" TouchNet will display a screen informing the payor that the system is off line for maintenance and to try again after the system is back online.
For any questions please contact dpp.support@ubc.ca

entry.title: Red Hat Satellite Service Maintenance June 11, 2026, 16:30 PT to June 11, 2026 21:00 PT
entry.content:
Jun 11, 21:00 PDT
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

Jun 11, 16:30 PDT
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Jun 11, 16:29 PDT
Scheduled - The UBC Satellite service will continue to be unavailable until approximately June 11, 2026 21:00 PT.

The Red Hat Satellite service provides errata and software updates to all registered Red Hat Linux systems. The service will be unavailable during the maintenance window. Users will be unable to register systems with the service, install software, or patches hosted by the service.

Satellite Organization administrators should review the release notes to ensure their organization is not adversely affected by API or other changes in functionality:

https://docs.redhat.com/en/documentation/red_hat_satellite/6.17/html/release_notes/index

entry.title: UBC SharePoint Maintenance Thursday, June 11, 2026 09:00 PT to 17:00 PT
entry.content:
Jun 11, 17:01 PDT
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

Jun 11, 09:00 PDT
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Jun 9, 15:16 PDT
Scheduled - On Thursday, June 11, 2026 from 09:00 PT to 17:00 PT, the UBC SharePoint Software as a Service (SaaS) service will be undergoing maintenance. During this maintenance window, SharePoint on-prem sites will be accessible as no interruptions to the service are expected.

Scheduled - On Thursday, June 11, 2026 from 09:00 PT to 17:00 PT, the UBC SharePoint Software as a Service (SaaS) service will be undergoing maintenance. During this maintenance window, SharePoint on-prem sites will be accessible as no interruptions to the service are expected.

entry.title: Enterprise Automation and Solution Delivery services maintenance for Scheduling Activity Transfer from Jun 11, 2026 14:00 -16:00
entry.content:
Jun 11, 16:00 PDT
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

Jun 11, 14:00 PDT
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Jun 11, 09:01 PDT
Scheduled - Enterprise Automation and Solution Delivery services maintenance for Scheduling Activity Transfer from Jun 11, 2026 14:00 -16:00

The EASD Team will be releasing software updates that may affect Scheduling services

During this maintenance window there may be a potential interruption to the apps and services for <30 min (between 14:00 to 16:00)
Release activities will be completed between from Jun 11, 2026 14:00 - 16:00, Validation will continue until 17:00.
Apps/Services:

Bug fixes / Enhancement for Scheduling Activity Transfer
Fix to change a course from Full Term to Single Term in Scientia for it to pick up the appropriate student fee group in WD

Fix to update Joint Teaching Arrangements (JTAs), to ensure JTAs with undergraduate and graduate courses come through CRSS
Impacts:

No other impacts to end users.
Reason for maintenance:

IRP Student: Scheduling Activity Transfer bug fixes

entry.title: Red Hat Satellite Service Maintenance June 11, 2026, 07:30 PT to June 11, 2026 15:30 PT
entry.content:
Jun 11, 15:30 PDT
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

Jun 11, 07:30 PDT
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Jun 10, 11:49 PDT
Scheduled - The UBC Satellite service will not be available on June 11, 2026, 07:30 PT to June 11, 2026 15:30 PT due to service maintenance.

The Red Hat Satellite service provides errata and software updates to all registered Red Hat Linux systems. The service will be unavailable during the maintenance window. Users will be unable to register systems with the service, install software, or patches hosted by the service.

Satellite Organization administrators should review the release notes to ensure their organization is not adversely affected by API or other changes in functionality:

https://docs.redhat.com/en/documentation/red_hat_satellite/6.17/html/release_notes/index

entry.title: Okanagan campus phone call quality issue - Wednesday June 10, 2026 12:00 PT
entry.content:
Jun 11, 09:50 PDT
Resolved - Technicians performed maintenance to remediate the issue last night which has resolved the issue, and will continue to closely monitor performance throughout the day today.

Jun 10, 13:17 PDT
Identified - Technicians have diagnosed the cause and will be implementing an emergency fix this evening to resolve the issue. Technicians will be monitoring the issue closely through the remainder of the afternoon/evening.

Callers may find brief periods where call quality is degraded. We apologize for any inconvenience.

Jun 10, 12:39 PDT
Investigating - Okanagan campus may be experiencing some Phone call quality issues. Technicians are working on remediating the issue. Next update at 13:15 PT.
